a:r.a:t: Bluegreen employee sentiment is consistently more positive than legacy HGV, though they still see room for improvement on compensation and lead quality
Summary of HGV Employee Sentiment vs Bluegreen Employee Sentiment
“Grateful to be a part of this company and team I work for!”
“Our reputation and name branding are the best in the industry!”
“We are seeing guests that realistically are not credit worthy and or do not have sufficient money to purchase.”
“Base pay is far too low for this job compared to other companies and current living cost.”
Note: Respondents with the “BG” prefix on their job codes or who have an “@bgvc.com” email domain were classified as Bluegreen employees. Otherwise, they were classified as HGV.
